summary: Refer & Earn feature update testing completed. All features working correctly - referral link auto-apply on signup, 5% bonus text, referral link display, share functionality, and how-it-works steps updated.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/referral/info - returns referral code (SM format)
Backend: GET /api/referral/info - returns referred_count and total_earned stats
Backend: GET /api/referral/info - requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: POST /api/auth/otp/complete-signup - accepts optional referral_code field
Backend: Referral code format starts with SM and is uppercase
Frontend: Signup page with ?ref=CODE shows referral message 'रेफरल कोड: CODE लागू होगा'
Frontend: Signup page without ?ref does NOT show referral message
Frontend: Refer page shows referral code (SM822A06)
Frontend: Refer page shows referral link with ?ref=CODE format
Frontend: Refer page has share button 'लिंक शेयर करें'
Frontend: Refer page has copy code button
Frontend: Refer page has apply referral input and button
Frontend: Hero text shows '5% बोनस' instead of '₹50'
Frontend: How-it-works steps updated for link-based flow
Frontend: Stats cards show referred count and total earned
critical_code_review_comments: SignupPage.js correctly reads ?ref param from URL using useSearchParams hook
SignupPage.js sends referral_code in complete-signup API call (line 70)
ReferPage.js correctly generates referral link with ?ref=CODE format
ReferPage.js shareCode function shares full link, not just code
Backend server.py OTPCompleteSignup model has optional referral_code field (line 120)
Backend auto-applies referral during signup if code is valid (lines 489-493)
All data-testid attributes present for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refer & Earn feature fully tested. Signup page shows referral message when ?ref=CODE is in URL. ReferPage shows full referral link below share button. Backend complete-signup accepts optional referral_code. 5% bonus is given on first deposit of referred user (process_referral_reward function in server.py lines 1217-1286).
